uncovered.note: NumberPolicy config-resolution record. Only reflected on (GetProperty) by MathHandler_ReadsPolicyViaAppConfigForNumberConfig; its actual app.config read + parent-context climb is never executed. The C# SubContext test is a no-op (Assert.That(true)), and the planned plang goals OverflowThrowSettingHonored/SubGoalInheritsParentPolicy were not created.

summary: Raw line coverage of changed production code is high (51/54 with >0%). The gap is not breadth but DEPTH: several green tests over the covered files assert nothing (placeholder Assert.That(true)), so executed lines are not the same as verified behavior. Config.cs (policy resolution) is the one changed file with a real 0% + no honest test behind it.
